title: The World's Religions
author: Huston Smith
notes: An overview of major world religions and their core beliefs.

title: A History of God
author: Karen Armstrong
notes: Explores the evolution of the concept of God in major religions.

title: The Sacred and The Profane
author: Mircea Eliade
notes: Discusses religious experiences and the distinction between sacred and ordinary life.

title: God Is Not One
author: Stephen Prothero
notes: Argues that different religions are not the same and have unique teachings.

title: Islam Between East and West
author: Ali Shariati
notes: Analyzes Islam's position between Western and Eastern philosophies.
